title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
